misc: Runs his mouth all the time
Constantly sees birds and other wildlife on the course
Might stand on the ball for quite some time in the tee box
biography: Juuso, a familiar face from Hyvinkään Golf, is known for his... spirited commentary on the course. One might say he never met a microphone he didn't like.

Beyond his talkative nature, Juuso possesses a keen eye for the natural world. He frequently pauses to admire the local fauna, often spotting birds and other wildlife that others might miss. While some might find this distracting, Juuso insists it helps him connect with the course.

Those who have played alongside Juuso know that he has a peculiar habit on the tee box. He is known to spend an extended amount of time standing over the ball, seemingly lost in thought, before finally taking his swing.

Hector Trophée 2026 will mark Juuso's ninth appearance at the tournament. While he is yet to capture either the Hector Trophée or the Victor Trophy, his enthusiasm and unique perspective make him a memorable participant.
